ddls:
CREATE TABLE "award_ceremonies" (
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_name" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award ceremony */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the award ceremony */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ceremony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the award category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award category */,
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the award ceremony */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., acting, directing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the nominated work */,
  "work_title" TEXT /* Title of the nominated work */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the work */,
  "directors" TEXT /* Directors of the work */,
  "writers" TEXT /* Writers of the work */,
  "producers" TEXT /* Producers of the work */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recipient (e.g., actor, director) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the recipient */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the recipient's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards_nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination or win */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the award ceremony */,
  "award_ceremony_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the award ceremony */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the award category */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the nominated work */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the recipient */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the nomination (e.g., Won, Nominated) */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date when the nomination was announced */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., acting, directing) */,
  "voting_body" TEXT /* Organization or body responsible for the nomination */,
  "jury_members" TEXT /* List of jury members involved in the decision-making process */,
  "public_notes" TEXT /* Publicly visible notes or comments about the nomination or win */,
  "private_notes" TEXT /* Privately visible notes or comments about the nomination or win (for internal use) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the nomination or win */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content_manager, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
